title: Crypto OHLCV-proxy regime-feasibility probe (B0199 analog for BTC/ETH/SOL; NO crypto L2 exists)
source: CEO chose 'crypto OHLCV-proxy feasibility probe' 2026-06-19 after B0199 (FX/metals synthetic L2) came back NO-GO. Honors the crypto angle of the original directive + completes a two-asset-class documented negative.
why: We have NO crypto L2 (only Binance 1-min OHLCV). A 'crypto microstructure Loop A' can only run on OHLCV-derived proxies, which is weaker than the FX/metals L2 that already failed B0199. Before any crypto Loop-A build, probe whether OHLCV-proxy microstructure regimes are even worth it -- and crucially, judge on the RIGHT criteria for crypto: NOT data quantity (crypto OHLCV is free + abundant, years available) but FIDELITY and NOVELTY-vs-the-existing-bar-Loop-A.
value_rationale: Cheap (~half day, reuses the B0199 probe + pipeline tooling) and gives crypto-specific closure + a stronger two-asset Best-Tech negative. Gate before any crypto Loop-A fork.
scope: Mirror B0199 (scripts/l2_regime_feasibility_probe.py) but for BTC/ETH/SOL on Binance 1-min OHLCV. Reuse the cell-table/floor/episode logic (refactor a shared helper if clean).

Use AMPLE crypto history (>=6-12 months, free Binance public dump, no key -- extend scripts/fetch_binance_crypto.py's DAYS range). Crypto data quantity is NOT the constraint; do not manufacture a false starvation NO-GO on the ~18-day proxy windows.

OHLCV-proxy 2x2 taxonomy (advisor crypto stratum): Axis A = realized-vol (toxicity degenerates to vol -- no signed trades for VPIN); Axis B = liquidity via Corwin-Schultz spread and/or Amihud illiquidity (pipeline/microstructure.py). Train-fit q75 thresholds on a train split; aggregate to ~M5-M15 bars.

Per-cell table: n_bars, n_episodes, n_calendar_days, n_qualifying_events (|z|>=2 overshoot on the bar close path). NO L2 -> depth_liveness N/A; NO artifact cross-check possible (state this -- a key honest limitation).

Judge on: (a) do cells populate to the floor (likely YES with ample data); (b) FIDELITY caveat (OHLCV-proxy != real microstructure; no OFI/depth/true VPIN); (c) NOVELTY -- does an OHLCV-proxy vol x liquidity regime add anything over the EXISTING bar Loop-A vol-regime, or is the vol axis redundant and only the Amihud/spread axis novel-but-proxy; (d) TRANSFER caveat (B0188: nothing transfers to the synthetic live venue).

VERDICT GO/NO-GO with honest framing -- research/Best-Tech only, never live-deployable. GO unblocks a crypto Loop-A build only if there is a defensible NOVEL microstructure axis worth building; else documented negative.
recommendation: Dispatch execution-engineer. Reuse the B0199 probe + pipeline modules verbatim; extend the Binance fetch to ample history. Light sanity tests + honest reporting; no full TDD ceremony (diagnostic).
out_of_scope: Any proposal/dossier/loop machinery (gated on this + B0199). Any live-deployable claim. Buying Tardis crypto L2.

history.reason: Build+run dispatched to execution-engineer 2026-06-19 (CEO chose the crypto OHLCV-proxy feasibility probe).

NO-GO / documented negative -- turned on NOVELTY/FIDELITY, NOT quantity. execution-engineer built+ran scripts/crypto_regime_feasibility_probe.py (7 tests green) on ~12.1 months of Binance 1-min OHLCV for BTC/ETH/SOL (527,040 1-min -> 35,137 M15 bars/symbol). ALL 12 cells (3 sym x 4 cells) CLEAR the floor (smallest 3,427 bars/377 events) -> the B0199 starvation killer does NOT reproduce on crypto. But: (a) vol axis overlaps the EXISTING bar Loop-A trend x vol regime (rv_20); (b) the only candidate-novel axis, liquidity/Amihud, is near-independent of vol (Cramer's V 0.004-0.119) BUT NON-INFORMATIVE -- fwd-return sigma ratio illiq/liq = 0.84-0.99 (sign wrong/null), the only >=0.20 gap is single-stratum + direction-inconsistent = the Amihud-on-volume confound ('illiquid' = low dollar-volume = quiet bars, re-measures quiescence not depth/impact); (c) OHLCV-proxy != real microstructure (no OFI/depth/signed-VPIN), NO crypto L2 to even run the artifact cross-check; (d) transfer = zero (B0188). Verdict GO requires a defensible NOVEL microstructure axis -> none -> NO-GO. Artifacts: results/crypto_feasibility/{per_cell_table.csv,novelty_vs_bar_loop.csv,feasibility_report.json}; verdict note docs/submission/crypto_regime_feasibility_2026-06-19.md; data data/binance_1m_12mo/. Completes the two-asset-class Best-Tech negative alongside B0199.
